summary.title: New Threat Model
summary.description:
A rich oligarch has hired you as an external contractor to help design and secure the Privacy-
Enhanced Resort and Vacancy Online system that will be used to manage the bookings and logistics
of a luxury resort on a small, private island in the United States Virgin Islands. The resort is
frequently visited by celebrities, politicians, royal family members and other very rich and important
people from all over the world. The oligarch wants to guarantee discretion for all of the guests, who
often register under pseudonyms in the system. Still, it is necessary to keep accurate guest
information in order to manage billing, as well as keeping track of food preferences, personal
requests and special room services. Furthermore, it is important to manage surveillance data from
the resort premises to detect unwanted intruders. In order to do this, AI-based facial recognition
should be used to map people in video recordings with legit guests and staff members in the system.
Make your own assumptions about how the system should be implemented. You can assume that
the system will be deployed in the US and that there must at least be one database somewhere
storing guest information, one pseudonymised database and one media database. An external
identity service should be used for authentication

data.name: trust boundary 4
data.description: should be isolated from psuedonym DB

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: Make sure authentication process is strict

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: A guest or attacker using a guest account denies having made a booking, changed reservation details, or performed malicious actions.
threats.mitigation: fix insufficient logging or audit trails.

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: modifying data for both management and booking.
threats.mitigation: strict rules for accessibility. Owasps vulnerability check tests for website

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: restrict login request per ip unit, block suspicous users, use CAPTCHA and divide traffic among several servers with auto scaling in cloud

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: ensure a good AI model while maintaining other ways of authentication as well

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: seperate logic to psuedo DB and maintain a secure internal identity resolver encryption

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: no sql injection possibilities. Strict authentificaiton

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: Make sure authentication process is strict for both cases with third party provider

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: Intercept data between request and response
threats.mitigation: ensure http and tls and public/private key encryption

data.name: Trust Boundary 1
data.description: should be the least trusted, could be anyone

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation: ensure authentification and strict physical boundaries to access files
